title: Schedule irrigations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Schedule irrigations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor crop and plant water use

pcs.text: Estimate or measure water use from one or more systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate or measure water use from one or more systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate or measure water use from one or more systems.

pcs.text: Accumulate water as a soil water deficit in the root zone
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accumulate water as a soil water deficit in the root zone?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accumulate water as a soil water deficit in the root zone.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor crop and plant water use

elements.title: Apply a measured amount of water

pcs.text: Predict a pre-determined deficit using a scheduling system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Predict a pre-determined deficit using a scheduling system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Predict a pre-determined deficit using a scheduling system.

pcs.text: Apply irrigation to partly or fully replace the deficit
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply irrigation to partly or fully replace the deficit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply irrigation to partly or fully replace the deficit.

pcs.text: Increase water quantities where appropriate to ensure dilution and transport of toxic solutes below the root zone
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Increase water quantities where appropriate to ensure dilution and transport of toxic solutes below the root zone?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Increase water quantities where appropriate to ensure dilution and transport of toxic solutes below the root zone.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Apply a measured amount of water

elements.title: Assess efficacy of irrigation and repeat cycles of irrigation

pcs.text: Measure effectiveness of irrigation application with in-field equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure effectiveness of irrigation application with in-field equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure effectiveness of irrigation application with in-field equipment.

pcs.text: Adjust estimated soil moisture level in scheduling system to match in-field measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust estimated soil moisture level in scheduling system to match in-field measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust estimated soil moisture level in scheduling system to match in-field measurements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recalibrate scheduling system where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recalibrate scheduling system where necessary.

pcs.text: Repeat cycles of irrigation until schedule is correctly established
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repeat cycles of irrigation until schedule is correctly established?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repeat cycles of irrigation until schedule is correctly established.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Assess efficacy of irrigation and repeat cycles of irrigation

elements.title: Record irrigation and scheduling parameters

pcs.text: Record each irrigation and significant rainfall event, plus other appropriate parameters used in scheduling system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record each irrigation and significant rainfall event, plus other appropriate parameters used in scheduling system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record each irrigation and significant rainfall event, plus other appropriate parameters used in scheduling system.

pcs.text: Estimate and record drainage amount below root zone at each irrigation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and record drainage amount below root zone at each irrigation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and record drainage amount below root zone at each irrigation.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record system performance data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record system performance data.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Record irrigation and scheduling parameters

elements.title: Plan for extremes of weather

pcs.text: Modify estimated deficits to cater for prolonged saturation following heavy rainfall
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify estimated deficits to cater for prolonged saturation following heavy rainfall?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify estimated deficits to cater for prolonged saturation following heavy rainfall.

pcs.text: Alter shift areas, and where applicable, application rates, to suit appropriate irrigation schedules to minimise frost damage where applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Alter shift areas, and where applicable, application rates, to suit appropriate irrigation schedules to minimise frost damage where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Alter shift areas, and where applicable, application rates, to suit appropriate irrigation schedules to minimise frost damage where applicable.

pcs.text: Implement strategies involving prioritising of plants and crops and intermittent irrigation at times of extreme heat
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement strategies involving prioritising of plants and crops and intermittent irrigation at times of extreme heat?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement strategies involving prioritising of plants and crops and intermittent irrigation at times of extreme heat.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Plan for extremes of weather

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
